options.line1: Met you when I was just fifteen, thought you hung the moon and stars,

options.line1: You've been my rock through every storm, my anchor in the night,
options.line2: Ten years together, three as husband, and you still hold me tight.

options.line1: You finally kissed me and the whole world changed,
options.line2: Ten years by your side and I'd do it again.

options.line1: Five long years before you finally leaned in close
options.line2: That one kiss and I knew I loved you most

options.line1: You fought your way to solid ground,
options.line2: And lifted me right off the ground.

options.line2: You've been my safe place right from the very start,

options.line1: Dillon you're the steady in my storm
options.line2: The arms that always keep me safe and warm

options.line1: With your hands that can fix anything, your heart made of gold,
options.line2: You're the greatest love story I could ever be told.

options.line1: Five years of mornings you chose to be strong,

options.line1: Ten years deep and I still get that feeling
options.line2: You're the boy I loved when I was fifteen

options.line1: Your daughter's got your gentle soul, your smile, your steady way,
options.line2: You're the father that you never had, every single day,

options.line1: You held up the world while I chased my degree,

options.line2: Five years strong, you answered all your hardest calls

options.line1: We both came from broken roads, but look at what we've made,

options.line2: Patient, kind, and never once complained

options.line1: You fix what is broken, you always come through,
options.line2: There's nothing this world puts down that can stop you.

options.line1: We traded wild and reckless younger nights
options.line2: For something deeper, something worth this life

options.line2: You make me feel so safe and loved, like you were always mine,

options.line1: Through every stage, every change, you've stayed right by my side,

options.line1: Our daughter's got a father who shows her the way,

options.line2: But that bottle made a bridge and neither one of us strayed.

options.line1: You were cautious to trust, you were guarded and strong,

options.line2: Then you passed that whiskey and it fit like a glove,

options.line1: You're my forever, my homestead, my queen,

options.line1: But now there's laughter in the air and a glow about your face,
options.line2: And darlin' I ain't ever leaving this beautiful place.
